subject: Sports
title: Senna vs Prost: Speed and Fury
description: A 60-second lesson on Senna vs Prost: Speed and Fury.

hook.text: Two Formula One teammates who hated each other. Their rivalry nearly killed them both—and it did kill one.

buildup.text: Ayrton Senna and Alain Prost were McLaren teammates in 1988-89. Senna was raw speed; Prost was calculated brilliance.

discovery.text: In 1989, Prost deliberately collided with Senna to clinch the championship. A year later, Senna did the same to Prost.

twist.text: Their mutual crashing at championship-deciding races scandalized Formula One and drew worldwide attention.

climax.text: Senna died at Imola in 1994. Prost was a pallbearer at his funeral. The hatred had long since turned to respect.

punchline.text: They crashed into each other for glory and cried at each other's loss.

quiz.question: What made the Senna vs Prost rivalry so extreme?
options: They deliberately crashed into each other in championship-deciding races
They competed for the same sponsor
They were from the same country
